items.claim: Ismael Bonfim is a backend UFC lightweight striker who eventually gets defeated.
items.quote: Ismael Bonfim is more of a, you know, backend UFC lightweight that's a fun striker. Mixes it up but eventually goes down.

items.claim: Axel Sola has good offensive striking, cardio, and a chin.
items.quote: he's got a good chin, good cardio, good offensive striking.

items.claim: Axel Sola has a big advantage in height and reach.
items.quote: big advantage in height and reach.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio is likely going to lose to Sam Patterson's kickboxing.
items.quote: Ponzi, the pride of Argentina, is most likely going down to the Sam Patterson lanky kickboxing.

items.claim: Sam Patterson is a sharp kickboxer with fast, clean straight hands and power despite his skinny build.
items.quote: He's a sharp kickboxer from the outside. He's got fast hands. He's clean with his straight shots. He hits hard, especially for that skinny build.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has a good ground game.
items.quote: And his ground game's good, too.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has a professional record of 14 wins and 3 losses.
